name: Level 19
description:
# Level 19: Swap Commands

Welcome to Level 19! Here we introduce two new convenient transformation commands: `swap_eq` and `swap_bi`.

These commands allow you to cleanly swap the left-hand and right-hand sides of an equality (`=`) or an equivalence (`⇔`).

- `swap_eq (occ) <target> <out> <equiv>`
- `swap_bi (occ) <target> <out> <equiv>`

All arguments are optional. If you don't specify occurrences, it swaps **all** occurrences in the target.

Your goal is to prove `z = y ⇔ y = x` given the hypothesis `H1: x = y ⇔ y = z`.
